details: Created DelegatorAgent.sol based on MetaMask Delegation Framework and ERC-7715 concepts. Implemented createDelegation, createSubDelegation, execute, revoke, verifyCall.
Forged foundry.toml remappings; resolved forge-std import paths; installed libs.
Wrote DelegatorAgent.t.sol and DemoFlow.t.sol covering creation, sub-delegation, revocation, value cap enforcement, expiry, selector restrictions.
outcome: Tests compile; some fork tests require BASE_RPC_URL

details: Created README, wrote problem statement and description, deployed to Sepolia, recorded tx 0x62746847b2be808283a82bc59efaf19f04678d4f5fb6e123514ba764bbe7c02c, updated Synthesis submission.
outcome: Project published on Synthesis (Best Use of Delegations track)

details: Identified critical issues: (1) createSubDelegation allowed wider permission sets than parent; (2) execute with selector restriction but short calldata bypassed check; (3) verifyCall had same short calldata bug; (4) getDelegation tuple usage incorrect in tests; (5) missing fallback; (6) stack too deep in contracts with many locals.

Added subset validation for targets/selectors in createSubDelegation; added require(data.length >= 4) when selectors restricted; switched calldata selector extraction to assembly using data.offset to avoid slice unsupported; added getChildren(uint256) getter; added fallback(); enabled viaIR in foundry.toml; corrected test tuple unpacking and added tests for new constraints.
outcome: Build successful; unit tests compile. Fork tests pending BASE_RPC_URL.

details: Added tracks: Let the Agent Cook and Agents With Receipts (ERC-8004). Updated conversationLog and submissionMetadata.intentionNotes. Commit e249c18 created.
outcome: Submission now multi-track. GitHub push pending credentials.
